title: Layouts / Partials / Head
summary: layouts/partials/head.html is preserved as a raw Hugo source artifact in the XanaNode Hugo substrate.
content:
<meta charset="utf-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1">
{{ $description := .Description | default .Params.summary | default site.Params.description | default site.Title }}
{{ $title := cond .IsHome site.Title (printf "%s | %s" .Title site.Title) }}
{{ $canonical := .Permalink }}
{{ $image := site.Params.image | default "xananode-icon.svg" | absURL }}
<title>{{ $title }}</title>
<meta name="description" content="{{ $description }}">
<link rel="canonical" href="{{ $canonical }}">
<meta name="robots" content="{{ site.Params.robots | default "index, follow" }}">
<meta name="theme-color" content="{{ site.Params.themeColor | default "#55d6be" }}">
<link rel="xananode-well-known" type="application/json" href="{{ ".well-known/xananode" | relURL }}">
<link rel="xananode-substrate" type="application/json" href="{{ "substrate.json" | relURL }}">
<link rel="xananode-nodes-index" type="application/json" href="{{ "nodes-index.json" | relURL }}">
<link rel="xananode-relationships" type="application/json" href="{{ "relationships.json" | relURL }}">
<link rel="xananode-viewer" type="application/json" href="{{ "xananode-viewer.json" | relURL }}">
<meta property="og:site_name" content="{{ site.Title }}">
<meta property="og:title" content="{{ $title }}">
<meta property="og:description" content="{{ $description }}">
<meta property="og:type" content="{{ if .IsPage }}article{{ else }}website{{ end }}">
<meta property="og:url" content="{{ $canonical }}">
<meta property="og:image" content="{{ $image }}">
<meta name="twitter:card" content="summary_large_image">
<meta name="twitter:title" content="{{ $title }}">
<meta name="twitter:description" content="{{ $description }}">
<meta name="twitter:image" content="{{ $image }}">
{{ with site.Params.keywords }}
<meta name="keywords" content="{{ delimit . ", " }}">
{{ end }}
<script>
  (function () {
    try {
      var theme = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem("xananode.colorTheme") || "\"dark\"");
      var density = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem("xananode.uiDensity") || "\"comfortable\"");
      var readerFontScale = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem("xananode.readerFontScale") || "100");
      var atmosphere = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem("xananode.graphAtmosphere") || "\"still\"");
      document.documentElement.dataset.xanaTheme = theme;
      document.documentElement.dataset.xanaDensity = density;
      document.documentElement.dataset.xanaAtmosphere = atmosphere;
      document.documentElement.style.setProperty("--xana-reader-scale", String(Math.min(150, Math.max(85, Number(readerFontScale) || 100)) / 100));
    } catch (_) {}
  })();
</script>
{{- $xanaParams := site.Params.xananode | default dict -}}
{{- $brandParams := index $xanaParams "brand" | default dict -}}
{{- $brandConfig := dict
  "name" (index $brandParams "name" | default "XanaNode")
  "tagline" (index $brandParams "tagline" | default (site.Params.tagline | default "Relationships preserve knowledge"))
  "icon" (index $brandParams "icon" | default "xananode-icon.svg" | relURL)
  "homeLabel" (index $brandParams "homeLabel" | default "Go to home node")
  "attributionLabel" (index $brandParams "attributionLabel" | default "XanaNode")
  "attributionText" (index $brandParams "attributionText" | default "xananode.com")
  "attributionUrl" (index $brandParams "attributionUrl" | default "https://xananode.com")
-}}
{{- $themeConfig := dict
  "brand" $brandConfig
  "namespace" (index $xanaParams "namespace" | default "")
  "homeNode" (index $xanaParams "homeNode" | default "start-here")
  "links" (index $xanaParams "links" | default (index $brandParams "links" | default slice))
  "searchPrompts" (index $xanaParams "searchPrompts" | default slice)
  "downloadSubstrate" (index $xanaParams "downloadSubstrate" | default false)
-}}
<script>
  window.XanaNodeTheme = {{ $themeConfig | jsonify | safeJS }};
</script>
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=IBM+Plex+Sans:wght@400;600;700&family=Fraunces:wght@700&display=swap">
{{ $style := resources.Get "css/style.css" | minify }}
<link rel="stylesheet" href="{{ $style.RelPermalink }}">
{{- with (index $xanaParams "downloadSubstrate") }}
  {{- if (index . "enabled" | default false) }}
    <link rel="xananode-substrate-archive" type="application/zip" href="{{ (index . "path" | default (printf "archives/%s.substrate" (index $xanaParams "namespace" | default "substrate"))) | relURL }}">
  {{- end }}
{{- end }}
<link rel="icon" href="{{ "favicon.ico" | relURL }}" sizes="any">
<link rel="icon" type="image/svg+xml" href="{{ "xananode-icon.svg" | relURL }}">
<link rel="icon" type="image/png" sizes="32x32" href="{{ "favicon-32x32.png" | relURL }}">
<link rel="icon" type="image/png" sizes="16x16" href="{{ "favicon-16x16.png" | relURL }}">
<link rel="apple-touch-icon" sizes="180x180" href="{{ "apple-touch-icon.png" | relURL }}">
<link rel="manifest" href="{{ "site.webmanifest" | relURL }}">
{{ with site.Params.analytics.gtag }}
<script async src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/gtag/js?id={{ . }}"></script>
<script>
  window.dataLayer = window.dataLayer || [];
  function gtag(){dataLayer.push(arguments);}
  gtag("js", new Date());
  gtag("config", "{{ . }}", { anonymize_ip: true });
</script>
{{ end }}
{{ with site.Params.analytics.plausibleDomain }}
<script defer data-domain="{{ . }}" src="{{ site.Params.analytics.plausibleSrc | default "https://plausible.io/js/script.js" }}"></script>
{{ end }}
{{ with site.Params.headExtra }}
{{ . | safeHTML }}
{{ end }}
